mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message ( user_id, title, content, type, sub_type, status, related_order_no, related_item_id, related_sell_order_id, item_name, bargain_price, sender_id, sender_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{subType}, 0, #{relatedOrderNo}, #{relatedItemId}, #{relatedSellOrderId}, #{itemName}, #{bargainPrice}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_message SET sub_type = #{subType}, status = #{status}, related_order_no = #{relatedOrderNo}, content = #{content}, title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_message SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
